name: Improper Neutralization of Comment Delimiters
description: The product does not properly neutralize comment delimiter characters (e.g., //, /*, --, #) in user input, allowing attackers to inject comment sequences that hide malicious code or cause the downstream parser to ignore security-critical portions of the input.
detection_pattern: INGRESS node provides user-controlled data containing comment delimiter characters that flows to TRANSFORM[code_construction] or EXTERNAL[query_engine] without a TRANSFORM[comment_delimiter_escape] that neutralizes comment syntax before the data reaches the interpreter
